raw_consumer_statement: We purchased a set of appliances for a whole home remodel from XXXX on our American Express XXXX card on XX/XX/XXXX for {$26000.00}. Our demolition began in late XX/XX/XXXX, but the construction did not finish until XXXX XXXX. We took delivery of some of the appliances from XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX but were told that the XXXX sets of laundry appliances ( XXXX and XXXX stacked washers and dryers ) on the truck were damaged and would not be taken off the truck and delivered. We were told by the driver that they would come the following week. The appliances were not delivered the following week and we were told again that they would come the next week. This was the same every week until XX/XX/XXXX when we were told that XXXX has closed its doors without notice. We contacted our XXXX who directed us to AMEX. We contacted AMEX in early XX/XX/XXXX about our dispute with the retailer. On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX declared bankruptcy. We attempted multiple times from XX/XX/XXXX until XX/XX/XXXX to get AMEX to respond to our claim for a credit back for the undelivered appliances, {$6000.00}. AMEX kept declining our requests for varied ; first they stated we were asking for {$26000.00}, and {$20000.00} ( a separate purchase on XXXX/XXXX/XXXX-goods delivered ) and {$1100.00} ( a separate ouches on XXXXgoods delivered ) which we have never asked for our contested as we took delivery of most of the purchased appliances. AMEX will not acknowledge verbally or in writing that we are requesting a refund of solely the undelivered sets of laundry appliances, {$6000.00}. They reject our claims due to the amount of time having passed, which is greater than XXXX  days from the time of purchase, despite the fact that our renovation took longer than XXXX working days to complete.
